documentation:
## Aliyun ROS PVTZ Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as PVTZ from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-pvtz';
```

param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'

documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

documentation: :Attribute: CreateTime: The time when the forwarding rule was created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosRule.attr_rule_name
documentation: :Attribute: RuleName: The name of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosRule.attr_type
documentation: :Attribute: Type: The type of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosRule.attr_vpcs
documentation: :Attribute: Vpcs: The virtual private clouds (VPCs) that are associated with the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosRule.attr_zone_name
documentation: :Attribute: ZoneName: The name of the forward zone.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosRule.rule_id
documentation: :Property: ruleId: The ID of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosRule.refresh_options
documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::PVTZ::Rule`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Rule` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-pvtz-rule>

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_bind_vpcs
documentation: :Attribute: BindVpcs: The VPCs associated with the zone.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_create_time
documentation: :Attribute: CreateTime: The time when the zone was created. The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ format. The time is displayed in UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_create_timestamp
documentation: :Attribute: CreateTimestamp: The time when the zone was created. This value is a UNIX timestamp representing the number of milliseconds that have elapsed since January 1, 1970, 00:00:00 UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_is_ptr
documentation: :Attribute: IsPtr: Indicates whether the zone is a reverse lookup zone.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_proxy_pattern
documentation: :Attribute: ProxyPattern: Indicates whether the recursive resolution proxy for subdomain names is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_record_count
documentation: :Attribute: RecordCount: The total number of DNS records added in the zone.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_remark
documentation: :Attribute: Remark: The description of the zone.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_resource_group_id
documentation: :Attribute: ResourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group to which the zone belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_slave_dns
documentation: :Attribute: SlaveDns: Indicates whether the secondary Domain Name System (DNS) feature is enabled for the zone.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_tags
documentation: :Attribute: Tags: The tags of the zone.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_update_time
documentation: :Attribute: UpdateTime: The time when the zone was last updated. The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ format. The time is displayed in UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_update_timestamp
documentation: :Attribute: UpdateTimestamp: The time when the zone was last updated. This value is a UNIX timestamp representing the number of milliseconds that have elapsed since January 1, 1970, 00:00:00 UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_zone_tag
documentation: :Attribute: ZoneTag: Not open to users for the time being, no value transfer is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.attr_zone_type
documentation: :Attribute: ZoneType: The zone type, temporarily closed to users, no need to pass values.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.datasource.RosZone.refresh_options
documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::PVTZ::Zone`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Zone` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-pvtz-zone>

modules.name: ros_cdk_pvtz
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS PVTZ Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as PVTZ from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-pvtz';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.attr_create_time
documentation: :Attribute: CreateTime: The timestamp when the forwarding rule was created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.attr_endpoint_id
documentation: :Attribute: EndpointId: The ID of the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.attr_endpoint_name
documentation: :Attribute: EndpointName: The name of the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.attr_forward_ip
documentation: :Attribute: ForwardIp: The information about each destination external server.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.attr_rule_name
documentation: :Attribute: RuleName: The name of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.attr_type
documentation: :Attribute: Type: The type of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.attr_vpcs
documentation: :Attribute: Vpcs: The information about each virtual private cloud (VPC) that is associated with the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.attr_zone_name
documentation: :Attribute: ZoneName: The domain name that requires Domain Name System (DNS) traffic forwarding.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.endpoint_id
documentation: :Property: endpointId: The ID of the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.rule_name
documentation: :Property: ruleName: The name of the forwarding rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.type
documentation:
:Property:

type: The type of the forwarding rule. Valid value:
OUTBOUND: forwards Domain Name System (DNS) traffic to one or more external IP addresses.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.zone_name
documentation: :Property: zoneName: The domain name that requires DNS traffic forwarding.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.ForwardIpProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param ip: true
param port: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.ForwardIpProperty.ip
documentation: :Property: ip: The IP address of the destination external server.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosRule.ForwardIpProperty.port
documentation: :Property: port: The port number of the destination external server.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PVTZ::Rule`, which is used to add a forwarding rule.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Rule` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-pvtz-rule>

:Property:

:Property:

authChannel: Authorization channel. Valid values:
AUTH_CODE: Verification code authorization, to verify whether the verification code passed in by AuthCode is correct.
RESOURCE_DIRECTORY: Resource directory authorization, verify whether the AuthorizedUserId and the current account have resource directory credit.When it is empty, it is the same as AUTH_CODE, that is, verification code authorization.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosUserVpcAuthorization.auth_code
documentation: :Property: authCode: Verification code, if AuthChannel takes "AUTH_CODE" or is empty, it is mandatory.

documentation:

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosZone.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosZone.dns_group
documentation:
:Property:

dnsGroup: Built-in authority location area. Valid values:

- NORMAL_ZONE: Default. normal zone (The parsing response result will be cached, and only back to the built-in authority normal zone if the cache is missed, the effect of parsing changes is affected by TTL time; Cannot use custom line analysis, weight analysis function.
- FAST_ZONE: Fast zone (Recommended: directly reply to the parsing request, the parsing delay is the lowest, and the record changes take effect in real time; Support custom line analysis, weight analysis.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosZone.ignored_stack_tag_keys
documentation: :Property: ignoredStackTagKeys: Stack tag keys to ignore

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosZone.proxy_pattern
documentation:
:Property:

proxyPattern: ZONE: completely hijack the entire zone.
RECORD: Incomplete hijacking, recursive resolution agent.
Default to ZONE.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosZone.remark
documentation: :Property: remark: 50 characters at most. It can only contain numbers, Chinese, English and special characters: "_-,.，。".

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.RosZone.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

documentation:

param key: true
param value: true
---

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PVTZ::Zone`, which is used to create a built-in authoritative zone.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosZone\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-pvtz-zone>

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.ZoneProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Zone`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-pvtz-zone>

```
param zone_name

Property zoneName: Zone name.

param dns_group

Property dnsGroup: Built-in authority location area. Valid values: - NORMAL_ZONE: Default. normal zone (The parsing response result will be cached, and only back to the built-in authority normal zone if the cache is missed, the effect of parsing changes is affected by TTL time; Cannot use custom line analysis, weight analysis function. - FAST_ZONE: Fast zone (Recommended: directly reply to the parsing request, the parsing delay is the lowest, and the record changes take effect in real time; Support custom line analysis, weight analysis.

param ignored_stack_tag_keys

Property ignoredStackTagKeys: Stack tag keys to ignore.

param proxy_pattern

Property proxyPattern: ZONE: completely hijack the entire zone. RECORD: Incomplete hijacking, recursive resolution agent. Default to ZONE.

param remark

Property remark: 50 characters at most. It can only contain numbers, Chinese, English and special characters: "_-,.，。".

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.ZoneProps.dns_group
documentation:
Property dnsGroup: Built-in authority location area.

- NORMAL_ZONE: Default. normal zone (The parsing response result will be cached, and only back to the built-in authority normal zone if the cache is missed, the effect of parsing changes is affected by TTL time; Cannot use custom line analysis, weight analysis function.
- FAST_ZONE: Fast zone (Recommended: directly reply to the parsing request, the parsing delay is the lowest, and the record changes take effect in real time; Support custom line analysis, weight analysis.

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.ZoneProps.ignored_stack_tag_keys
documentation: Property ignoredStackTagKeys: Stack tag keys to ignore.

RECORD: Incomplete hijacking, recursive resolution agent.
Default to ZONE.

It can only contain numbers, Chinese, English and special characters: "_-,.，。".

methods.name: ros_cdk_pvtz.ZoneProps.tags
